## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming changes.](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy is repositioning as a "data integration platform" with focus on data preparation](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Content performance shows positive trends in impressions and rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [New team member Cody introduced as Content Operations Manager](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Plans to expand content strategy and leverage existing assets (webinars, interviews)](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Cody introduced as new Content Operations Manager for Prophecy](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Kyle leads Client Services Strategy at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Vivek manages day-to-day content operations for Prophecy account](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

### Prophecy Repositioning

  - [Shifting from "data transformation co-pilot" to "data integration platform"](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Focus on self-service data preparation](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Press release and marketing materials planned for next Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [May impact keywords and content positioning](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Content Performance Update

  - [Impressions and rankings improving](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Three articles now in top 10 average positions](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

  - [First click from ChatGPT recorded](https://fathom.video/share/Pd32oExNQWXiiwmsGzmCXSQ1m6nJw-3p?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### Technical Updates
